name: io.github.kryptobaseddev/cleo-mcp-server
title: CLEO MCP Server
description: Task management for solo developers and AI coding agents — CQRS pattern, 200 operations across 10 domains

packageArguments.description: Start the MCP stdio server instead of the CLI

environmentVariables.name: CLEO_PROJECT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Path to CLEO project directory (must contain .cleo/ folder)

tools.name: query
tools.description: Read-only operations across 10 domains: tasks, session, orchestrate, memory, pipeline, check, admin, tools, nexus, sticky

tools.name: mutate
tools.description: Write operations across 10 domains: tasks, session, orchestrate, memory, pipeline, check, admin, tools, nexus, sticky

features: CQRS 2-gateway pattern (94% token reduction vs traditional MCP tool approach)
Anti-hallucination validation on all task operations
Atomic file operations with backup and rollback
